test-case.description: returns the correct number of findings
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.v3 schema conversion.returns the correct number of findings
Normalize-AlzQueries.v3 schema conversion.sets SchemaVersion to 2.0
Normalize-AlzQueries.v3 schema conversion.sets Source to alz-queries
Normalize-AlzQueries.v3 schema conversion.sets Platform to Azure
Normalize-AlzQueries.v3 schema conversion.sets EntityType to AzureResource

test-case.description: lowercases the ARM ResourceId into EntityId
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.CanonicalId normalization.lowercases the ARM ResourceId into EntityId

test-case.description: does not have a trailing slash on EntityId
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.CanonicalId normalization.does not have a trailing slash on EntityId
Normalize-AlzQueries.ARM path parsing.parses SubscriptionId from ARM ResourceId
Normalize-AlzQueries.ARM path parsing.parses ResourceGroup from ARM ResourceId
Normalize-AlzQueries.field preservation.preserves Compliant boolean correctly
Normalize-AlzQueries.field preservation.preserves Severity values
Normalize-AlzQueries.field preservation.preserves Category values
Normalize-AlzQueries.field preservation.preserves Title
Normalize-AlzQueries.field preservation.preserves Detail

test-case.description: returns empty array for failed tool output
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.error handling.returns empty array for failed tool output

test-case.description: returns empty array for null Findings
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.error handling.returns empty array for null Findings

test-case.description: returns empty array for empty Findings
test-case.name: Normalize-AlzQueries.error handling.returns empty array for empty Findings
Normalize-AlzQueries.error handling.handles missing optional fields gracefully

test-case.description: maps subscription-scoped findings to Subscription EntityType

test-case.description: maps governance findings without ResourceId to ManagementGroup EntityType
test-case.name: Normalize-AzGovViz.entity type mapping.maps governance findings without ResourceId to ManagementGroup EntityType

test-case.description: uses stable canonical IDs for MG findings (not random GUIDs)
test-case.name: Normalize-AzGovViz.entity type mapping.uses stable canonical IDs for MG findings (not random GUIDs)
Normalize-AzGovViz.CanonicalId normalization.lowercases EntityId
Normalize-AzGovViz.subscription parsing.parses SubscriptionId for subscription-scoped findings
Normalize-AzGovViz.field preservation.preserves Compliant boolean correctly
Normalize-AzGovViz.field preservation.preserves Severity values
Normalize-AzGovViz.field preservation.preserves Category values
Normalize-AzGovViz.field preservation.preserves Title

ConvertTo-CanonicalArmId.lowercases and trims trailing slash
ConvertTo-CanonicalArmId.throws on empty input
ConvertTo-CanonicalRepoId.strips protocol and .git suffix
ConvertTo-CanonicalRepoId.throws on invalid input
ConvertTo-CanonicalAdoId.normalizes ado identifiers
ConvertTo-CanonicalAdoId.handles dev.azure.com URLs
ConvertTo-CanonicalSpnId.normalizes appId values
ConvertTo-CanonicalSpnId.resolves objectId values with lookup
ConvertTo-CanonicalEntityId.derives platform metadata
ConvertTo-CanonicalEntityId.throws on empty input

test-case.description: uses identity-correlator key for identity scope by default
test-case.name: Get-CheckpointKey.uses identity-correlator key for identity scope by default

test-case.description: sanitizes path-like values in scope keys
test-case.name: Get-CheckpointKey.sanitizes path-like values in scope keys

test-case.description: saves and retrieves a checkpoint correctly
test-case.name: Save-Checkpoint / Get-Checkpoint roundtrip.saves and retrieves a checkpoint correctly
Save-Checkpoint / Get-Checkpoint roundtrip.returns null for missing checkpoint

test-case.description: removes a checkpoint and returns true
test-case.name: Save-Checkpoint / Get-Checkpoint roundtrip.removes a checkpoint and returns true

test-case.description: uses atomic write (temp file does not persist)
test-case.name: Save-Checkpoint / Get-Checkpoint roundtrip.uses atomic write (temp file does not persist)

test-case.description: sanitizes traversal attempts to stay within checkpoint dir
test-case.name: Get-CheckpointPath traversal guard.sanitizes traversal attempts to stay within checkpoint dir
Get-CheckpointPath cross-platform separator.uses platform-native directory separator

test-case.description: sums aggregate counters when duplicate entities are merged from spill files
test-case.name: EntityStore spill merge.sums aggregate counters when duplicate entities are merged from spill files
ConvertTo-MaskedId.masks appId values
ConvertTo-MaskedId.masks objectId values
ConvertTo-MaskedId.redacts tenantId values

test-case.description: bypasses masking when IncludeSensitiveDetails is set
test-case.name: ConvertTo-MaskedId.bypasses masking when IncludeSensitiveDetails is set
ConvertTo-MaskedId.returns null inputs as null
Invoke-WithRetry.returns on first success
Invoke-WithRetry.retries retryable failures
Invoke-WithRetry.fails fast on non-retryable errors
Invoke-WithRetry.throws after max retries
Remove-Credentials.redacts ghp tokens
Remove-Credentials.redacts gho tokens
Remove-Credentials.redacts ghs tokens
Remove-Credentials.redacts ghr tokens
Remove-Credentials.redacts fine-grained GitHub PATs

test-case.description: redacts ADO PAT basic auth headers
test-case.name: Remove-Credentials.redacts ADO PAT basic auth headers
Remove-Credentials.redacts Authorization headers
Remove-Credentials.redacts bearer tokens outside headers
Remove-Credentials.redacts connection string secrets
Remove-Credentials.does not alter normal text

test-case.description: throws when required fields are missing

test-case.description: creates an entity stub with empty observations

test-case.description: returns true for valid finding rows
test-case.name: Test-FindingRow.returns true for valid finding rows

test-case.description: returns false with errors for non-canonical IDs
test-case.name: Test-FindingRow.returns false with errors for non-canonical IDs
WorkerPool module syntax.parses without syntax errors

test-case.description: executes tool scriptblocks in parallel and returns results
test-case.name: Invoke-ParallelTools.executes tool scriptblocks in parallel and returns results

test-case.description: captures tool failures without crashing the pool
test-case.name: Invoke-ParallelTools.captures tool failures without crashing the pool
